steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Clue: The sentence introduces an example with 'for instance,' which requires a specific, data-driven contrast to the preceding claim that female farmers constituted the majority in cultivating 'specific types of crops.' The correct answer must isolate a region/crop pairing where women clearly outnumber men.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice C isolates a specific regional/crop subset (non–root vegetables in both north and south Ondo) where women are the majority (e.g., 68% and 71% respectively). The other three choices either generalize or misalign with the majority claim—A merges two regions/crops without confirming dominance in all; B reverses the crop/region logic; D contradicts the 'majority' emphasis by citing equal proportions. That matches choice C — C is correct.
